name: web_scraper
description: Unified web operations tool with intelligent content detection, cascading fetch pipeline, reader-mode extraction, image downloading, RSS/Atom feeds, and web search. Detects content type via heuristics and recommends the best extraction mode. When confidence is low, returns analysis for the LLM agent to decide.

url.description: Target URL (required for all actions except search)

extract_mode.description: Extraction strategy for scrape_full. 'auto' detects and picks one mode. 'full' runs every extractor (article metadata + text + tables + links + images). 'article' uses reader mode. 'structured' extracts tables/links. 'images_only' skips text. 'raw' dumps unfiltered text as fallback. Default: auto

output_dir.description: Directory to store scraped content (auto-generated if not provided)

wait_for_js.description: Wait for JavaScript rendering. 'true' or 'false'. Default: true

wait_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for page loading. Default: 10

download_images.description: Download images found on page. 'true' or 'false'. Default: true

max_images.description: Maximum images to download (filters tiny images automatically). Default: 50

clean_text.description: Clean and normalize text content. 'true' or 'false'. Default: true

summarize.description: Generate text summary. 'true' or 'false'. Default: true

max_results.description: Maximum search results to return. Default: 10

max_entries.description: Maximum feed entries to return. Default: 20

output.description: Optional file path to write result JSON
